data.title: Trump Administration's Promotion Of Elon Musk's Tesla Draws Criticism From Experts: 'The Commerce Secretary Is Not Jim Cramer,' Says Former Ethics Counsel
data.description: Members of the Trump administration are facing ethics backlash for openly promoting Tesla, as the EV giant's stock slides.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Reveals He Will Remain JPMorgan's CEO For 'Few More Years,' Jokes He Won't Swear This Time
data.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon addressed employees at a town hall meeting, discussing his future, diversity efforts, and return-to-office policy.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Scoops Up Iridium, Beam, Pacific Biosciences While Offloading Illumina And Amgen
data.description: Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made notable trades, buying IRDM, BEAM, PACB, ABSI and selling ILMN, RPTX, AMGN, VEEV.

data.title: A Peek Inside Google's 100-Day AI Sprint: How Gemini Went From Generating Controversial Images To Emerging As A ChatGPT Rival
data.description: Google raced to create a rival to ChatGPT, facing challenges and controversies along the way. Despite setbacks, analysts are optimistic about Alphabet's position in the AI race.

data.title: Sam Altman-Led OpenAI Faces Legal Action Over ChatGPT 'Hallucination' That Accused Man Of Murder
data.description: A Norwegian man is suing OpenAI after ChatGPT falsely claimed he murdered his children, sparking legal and ethical concerns about AI hallucinations and violations of European data protection laws.
